when did apple computer change to apple inc Apple Computer officially changed its name to Apple Inc. on January 9, 2008, reflecting a broader corporate identity that extended beyond just the hardware and software of individual computers into a wider range of consumer electronics and services. This date marks the formal incorporation of the company as Apple Inc., effective immediately.
